stemHtml: On departure a few bangs can be heard coming from the aircraft's nose, but all instrument and engine readings are normal. An immediate valid action with respect to safety would be to...

options.b: After any bird strike, an immediate landing is mandatory to check for damage.
options.c: Verify the QNH with Air Traffic Control.
options.d: Advise the appropriate ATS unit about a bird strike when workload permits.
